no_changes_reason: Code already follows SOLID/KISS/DRY/YAGNI principles. simpleHash is correctly scoped as a private function. Constants (REPO_DOT_SATURATION, REPO_DOT_LIGHTNESS) are properly extracted. generateRepositoryColor is pure and deterministic. Naming is clear and consistent. Tests cover edge cases, idempotency, special characters, and format validation. No code smells, duplication, or unnecessary complexity detected.
review_notes: simpleHash uses djb2 algorithm - appropriate for non-cryptographic color hashing
generateRepositoryColor is called inline in GroupHeader JSX; memoization unnecessary per YAGNI (trivially fast computation)
Constants REPO_DOT_SATURATION and REPO_DOT_LIGHTNESS are properly extracted and tested
Test coverage includes idempotency, different inputs, empty string, special characters, and HSL format validation
GroupHeader component correctly uses aria-hidden on color dot span
